song.title: On Toward the Goal
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) “On toward the goal!” Press on! Alone, yet unafraid; He cut the path, who beckons thee, On then, and undismayed.
[V2] 2) “On toward the goal!” Press on! The eyes that are aflame Are watching thee, what then are men? What matter praise, or blame?
[V3] 3) “On toward the goal!” Press on! Look not behind thee now, When just ahead lies His “Well done,” And crowns await thy brow.
[V4] 4) “On toward the goal!” Press on! Blind, deaf and sometimes dumb Along the blood-marked, uphill way, Hard after Christ, press on!
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
